name: Family Recipe
additional_info: Bombs are crafted with 2 Iron and 1 Coal. Pressing E while holding a bomb will throw it, while pressing M1 while holding a bomb will drop it at your feet. Bombs have a 5 second cooldown on throw. Bombs do not deal self damage. Bomb damage scales on your Intelligence attribute, dealing 10 damage at 0 Intelligence and scaling up to 45.5 damage at 100 Intelligence. Bombs deal typeless damage, ignoring armor.
desc: You can now craft bombs at a crafting bench.
